title: New AI image generator BEATS EVERYTHING
summary: A YouTube video reviews ChatGPT Images 2.0 against competitors like Nano Banana across diverse tasks including poster generation, UI design, animation spritesheet creation, and spatial reasoning. The reviewer demonstrates the tool's capabilities through examples spanning product catalogs, storyboards, and visual problem-solving scenarios.
